name: documents
description: Index local documents and ask questions about them (RAG). Supports .txt, .md, .py, .pdf and more.
author: Jarvis

actions.name: index_file
actions.description: Index a single file into document memory

actions.name: index_folder
actions.description: Index all supported files in a folder

actions.name: search_documents
actions.description: Search indexed documents by semantic similarity

actions.name: ask_documents
actions.description: Ask a question and get an answer based on your documents

actions.name: remove_document
actions.description: Remove a document from the index

parameters.document_id: ID of the document to remove

actions.name: clear_index
actions.description: Clear all documents and chunks from the index
